历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023 (Science), the lowest rank was approximately 32,082; in 2024 (Physics Category), approximately 47,901; in 2025 (Physics Category), approximately 44,716. In 2024, Guizhou's first year of the new college entrance exam, the rank shifted significantly backward by about 15,819 places; in 2025, compared to 2024, it moved forward by about 3,185 places, showing a stabilizing and rebounding trend. The baseline rank for 2025 is about 44,716; the enrollment plan was 22 in 2024, increased to 29 in 2025, and planned at 26 in 2026, a decrease of 3 (about 10.3% reduction) compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer competitive slots, exerting pressure for the rank to move forward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was about 189th in 2022, about 192nd in 2024, and about 195th in 2025, with a slight decline in recent years, but overall in the middle-to-lower segment nationally; from 2021 to 2026, the university reputation documents contain no relevant public opinion records for Tibet University, indicating no significant positive or negative events in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 30th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with some attention on short video platforms, which may have a weak boost to application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above, so its disciplinary competitiveness is relatively average, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Communication Engineering, etc., among which Clinical Medicine (recommended/relatively hot), Computer Science (recommended/relatively hot), and Electronics/Communication (highly recommended) are all socially popular major directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou is about 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,258), and by proportion, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 208,403, with a slight expansion of the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline rank of 44,716, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.3% (causing the rank to move forward), a slight increase in the total number of candidates (slightly intensifying competition), and the Douyin popularity being relatively hot (weakly boosting attention), after fine-tuning with the candidate scale, the predicted lowest rank for the 2026 Physics Category is about 41,970, with a range of 41,470-42,470.
